hooks.prompt: Check if this git commit command follows the x-commit skill conventions. The commit message MUST use the format `:gitmoji: type(scope): imperative description` (e.g. `:bug: fix(auth): prevent crash when session expires`). If the message does NOT match this format, block it and tell the model to invoke the x-commit skill first with /x-commit. If it DOES match, allow it. Here is the command: $ARGUMENTS
